title: gymnopogon fastigiatus subsp. jubiflorus
intro: Gymnopogon fastigiatus subsp. jubiflorus, commonly known as Jubiflorus, is a tropical plant species within the family Poaceae. The plant is also known as 'jubiflorus' or 'jubiflor', with various medicinal properties attributed to its extracts, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is used for its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting the immune system, due to its bioactive compounds and antioxidants. Gymnopogon fastigiatus subsp. jubiflorus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for medicinal use.
